title: Glamorous Glass
description: Removes streaks from glass and tinted glass and removes both the border and streaks from stained glass. Supports connected textures.
body:
# Glamorous Glass
Removes streaks from glass and tinted glass. Removes both the border and streaks from stained glass. Makes regular glass translucent. Supports connected textures.
## Dependencies
- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/project/1IjD5062): Optional, for connected textures. (and translucent glass before 1.21.11)
## Compatibility
- [**Mortar**](https://modrinth.com/project/26zEKxNr)
---
